◆ Finish()

void MCAssembler::Finish ( )

Finish - Do final processing and write the object to the output stream. Writer is used for custom object writer (as the MCJIT does), if not specified it is automatically created from backend.

Definition at line 881 of file MCAssembler.cpp.

References llvm::MCAsmBackend::applyFixup(), begin(), llvm::MCSectionData::begin(), DEBUG_WITH_TYPE, dump(), llvm::dyn_cast(), end(), llvm::MCSectionData::end(), llvm::errs(), llvm::MCObjectWriter::ExecutePostLayoutBinding(), F, getBackend(), getWriter(), MCAsmLayout, llvm::MCSectionData::setLayoutOrder(), and llvm::MCObjectWriter::WriteObject().

Referenced by llvm::MCObjectStreamer::FinishImpl().

◆ isSymbolLinkerVisible()

bool MCAssembler::isSymbolLinkerVisible ( const MCSymbol & SD) const

Check whether a particular symbol is visible to the linker and is required in the symbol table, or whether it can be discarded by the assembler. This also effects whether the assembler treats the label as potentially defining a separate atom.

Definition at line 428 of file MCAssembler.cpp.

References llvm::MCAsmBackend::doesSectionRequireSymbols(), and getBackend().

Referenced by getAtom().
